titles.text: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Girlfriend of Steel
新世紀エヴァンゲリオン 鋼鉄のガールフレンド

descriptions.text: 1997年に発売された日本のコンピュータゲーム

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Girlfriend of Steel (新世紀エヴァンゲリオン鋼鉄のガールフレンド, Shinseiki Evangerion: Kōtetsu no Gārufurendo) is a video game based on the Gainax anime/manga series Neon Genesis Evangelion, released officially only in Japan for the PlayStation, Sega Saturn, PlayStation 2, PSP, Windows (PC), and Macintosh. Neon Genesis Evangelion: Girlfriend of Steel 2nd, first released in 2005, is not a narrative sequel and does not feature the original character Mana Kirishima. She reappears in other spin-offs, such as Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project.
